name: Silverheart Resonance
descriptionTemplate:
Ramona: Timeworn obtains an additional 2.5 Keyflare Regen attribute. Each Affinity level additionally grants Ramona: Timeworn 0.5 Keyflare Regen attribute.
For each Keyflare Regen Level attribute, the {Loop} effect of "Basic Strike" grants Ramona: Timeworn 0.2% Crit. Rate, and the {Loop} effect of "Basic Defense" grants Ramona: Timeworn 0.2 Aliemus.
